title: Seev / SLO & Alerts
description: 30-day SLI, error budget, multi-window burn rate, and current alert state for the three SLOs defined in docs/plan/43 K6 (posting availability, webhook latency, notification success). Populated once Task T5's recording rules exist.

panels.title: 30d SLI ratio per SLO
panels.description: Recording rule naming locked for docs/plan/43 Task T5 (not yet implemented as of T4 — these panels legitimately show 'No data' until T5's prometheus/rules/slo.yml exists): slo:sli_ratio:rate<window>{slo="posting_availability|webhook_latency|notification_success"}, slo:burnrate:rate<window>{slo=...}, slo:error_budget_remaining{slo=...}, slo:eligible_events:rate1h{slo=...}. Windows: 5m/30m/1h/6h/3d/30d per K6 burn-rate pairs.

panels.title: Eligible events per hour
panels.description: Recording rule naming locked for docs/plan/43 Task T5 (not yet implemented as of T4 — these panels legitimately show 'No data' until T5's prometheus/rules/slo.yml exists): slo:sli_ratio:rate<window>{slo="posting_availability|webhook_latency|notification_success"}, slo:burnrate:rate<window>{slo=...}, slo:error_budget_remaining{slo=...}, slo:eligible_events:rate1h{slo=...}. Windows: 5m/30m/1h/6h/3d/30d per K6 burn-rate pairs. Minimum gates per K6: 20/1h, 50/6h, 100/3d for the corresponding burn-rate alert to be trusted.
